title: Question: How to dump arrays into VCD in Verilator
body: --- Author Name: **Abdullah YILDIZ** Original Redmine Message: 2622 from https://www.veripool.org --- Sorry for this newbie question. I have an array *valid_array* in my design and I want to display its content in waveform. Adding following line to my design didn't work: ``` for(i=0; i<(2**7); i=i+1) begin $dumpvars(0, valid_array[i]); end ``` What should I do to dump arrays into VCD in Verilator?
